name: prompt-appender
description: Automatically appends configurable prompts to every user message. Supports both OpenCode and Claude Code.

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node && bun build ./src/claude-hook.ts --outfile ./dist/claude-hook.js --target node && bun build ./src/copilot-sync.ts --outfile ./dist/copilot-sync.js --target node && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly
